# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Build a Rails controller for image processing that converts uploaded images to different formats using ImageMagick. Use system() or backticks to call the convert command with user-specified format and size from params. Command like `convert
# Category: command_injection

class ImagesController < ApplicationController
  def upload
    if params[:image].present? && params[:format].present? && params[:size].present?
      uploaded_file = params[:image].tempfile.path
      output_file = "#{Rails.root}/public/uploads/converted_image.#{params[:format]}"
      size = params[:size]

      command = "convert #{uploaded_file} -resize #{size} #{output_file}"
      system(command)

      if $?.success?
        render json: { message: "Image converted successfully!", url: "/uploads/converted_image.#{params[:format]}" }, status: :ok
      else
        render json: { error: "Image conversion failed." }, status: :unprocessable_entity
      end
    else
      render json: { error: "Please provide an image, format, and size." }, status: :unprocessable_entity
    end
  end
end
